name: Claude: Recent Chats
description: Open Claude in a dedicated tab and return the visible recent chat list from the sidebar.

help.summary: List recent Claude conversations from the sidebar.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of threads to return. Defaults to 10.

examples.description: Return the 10 most recently surfaced threads

help.returns: thread_id, title, thread_url, sidebar_order, and section_label for each visible thread.
notes: Requires a logged-in Claude session in the active Chrome profile.
Day filtering was removed in v1.1.0 because Claude no longer exposes per-thread timestamps in the sidebar DOM.

sequences.name: claude_recent_chats
sequences.description: Open Claude home -> wait for the sidebar -> return visible recent chats.

steps.name: Open Claude home in a dedicated tab
Wait for the Claude shell or chat list
Read recent Claude chats
steps.script: const cleanArg = (value) => { const text = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text) ? '' : text; }; const parseNumber = (value, fallback) => { const parsed = Number.parseInt(cleanArg(value), 10); return Number.isFinite(parsed) && parsed > 0 ? parsed : fallback; }; const limit = parseNumber(arg0, 10); const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const isVisible = (node) => !!(node && node instanceof Element && getComputedStyle(node).visibility !== 'hidden' && getComputedStyle(node).display !== 'none' && node.getBoundingClientRect().width > 0 && node.getBoundingClientRect().height > 0); const normalizeUrl = (raw) => { if (!raw) return ''; try { return new URL(raw, window.location.origin).toString(); } catch { return String(raw); } }; const threadIdFromHref = (raw) => { const url = normalizeUrl(raw); if (!url) return ''; try { const match = new URL(url).pathname.match(/\/chat\/([^/?#]+)/); return match ? match[1] : ''; } catch { return ''; } }; const cleanSectionLabel = (node) => { if (!node) return ''; const clone = node.cloneNode(true); clone.querySelectorAll("button, [role='button'], svg, [aria-hidden='true']").forEach((child) => child.remove()); return normalize(clone.innerText || clone.textContent || '').replace(/\s*(hide|show)\s*$/i, '').trim(); }; const sectionLabelFor = (anchor) => { const scopes = [anchor.closest('section'), anchor.closest('nav'), anchor.closest('aside'), anchor.parentElement, anchor.parentElement?.parentElement].filter(Boolean); for (const scope of scopes) { const heading = scope.querySelector('h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, [role="heading"]'); const label = cleanSectionLabel(heading); if (label) return label; } return ''; }; const anchors = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("a[href*='/chat/']")).filter(isVisible); const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); anchors.forEach((anchor, index) => { const href = normalizeUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href); const threadId = threadIdFromHref(href); if (!threadId || seen.has(threadId)) return; seen.add(threadId); const text = normalize(anchor.innerText || anchor.textContent || ''); const title = text.split('\n').map(normalize).filter(Boolean)[0] || threadId; const sectionLabel = sectionLabelFor(anchor) || null; entries.push({ thread_id: threadId, title, thread_url: href, section_label: sectionLabel, sidebar_order: index }); }); const returned = entries.slice(0, limit); const authRequired = entries.length === 0 && /log in|sign in|continue with google|continue with email/i.test(normalize(document.body.innerText || '').toLowerCase()); return { url: window.location.href, title: document.title, total_available: entries.length, returned_count: returned.length, filters: { limit }, auth_required: authRequired, threads: returned };
